message:
docs(phase2c): update security threat matrix and differential report with FT-P2C-006 serialization checks

Update two cross-cutting phase2c artifacts to incorporate the
serialization packet (FT-P2C-006) validation results:

**SECURITY_COMPATIBILITY_THREAT_MATRIX_V1.md:**
- Clarified FT-P2C-006 strict-mode column: "fails" -> "fails closed"
  to explicitly denote fail-closed semantics for unknown field,
  version mismatch, and hash mismatch detection.
- Clarified hardened-mode column: now references the specific drift ID
  "serialization.bounded_malformed_diagnostic" for the bounded
  diagnostic context allowance.
- Added threat model artifact reference for FT-P2C-006 in the
  evidence trail section.

**conformance/differential_report_v1.json:**
- Total checks increased from 180 to 216 (36 new serialization checks
  across strict and hardened modes).
- Allowlisted drifts increased from 4 to 6 (2 new hardened-only
  serialization policy drifts for bounded_malformed_diagnostic).
- Blocking drifts remain at 0; failed checks remain at 0.
- Oracle now resolves to the project-local .venv-py314 Python
  environment with torch 2.10.0+cpu.
- New check types include: decode_roundtrip_contract,
  proof_determinism_contract, metamorphic_entry_order_hash_invariant,
  adversarial_unknown_field_rejected, adversarial_version_mismatch_rejected,
  adversarial_checksum_tamper_rejected, adversarial_malformed_json_rejected,
  adversarial_raptorq_corruption_probe, and hardened policy checks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -31,7 +31,7 @@ Scope: Phase-2C packet families (`FT-P2C-001`, `FT-P2C-002`, `FT-P2C-003`, `FT-P
 | `FT-P2C-002` | dispatch key routing | reject unknown bits and incompatible keysets | composite/backend-select fallback to backend key only |
 | `FT-P2C-003` | op schema ingestion | reject malformed/ambiguous schema strings and incompatible dispatch metadata | none (parity-only) |
 | `FT-P2C-004` | autograd scheduling/reentrancy | reentrant depth overflow fails | bounded depth clamp with explicit telemetry flag |
-| `FT-P2C-006` | checkpoint parsing/recovery | unknown field/version/hash mismatch fails | bounded diagnostics for malformed payloads; no incompatible acceptance |
+| `FT-P2C-006` | checkpoint parsing/recovery | unknown field/version/hash mismatch fails closed | bounded malformed diagnostic context only (`serialization.bounded_malformed_diagnostic`); no incompatible acceptance |
 
 ## Drift Gates
 
@@ -44,4 +44,5 @@ Scope: Phase-2C packet families (`FT-P2C-001`, `FT-P2C-002`, `FT-P2C-003`, `FT-P
 
 - `artifacts/phase2c/HARDENED_DEVIATION_ALLOWLIST_V1.json`
 - packet `risk_note.md` files with compatibility/security mitigations
+- packet threat-model artifacts for active packet C tasks (current: `artifacts/phase2c/FT-P2C-006/threat_model.md`)
 - packet parity sidecars and decode proofs
